title: Blox AI /var/log/fula/ai-feedback.jsonl line shape
description: Phase 16 contract. Container appends one JSON object per line to /var/log/fula/ai-feedback.jsonl on every /feedback request. Rotates at 10 MB matching ai-pending-actions.jsonl convention (entries are rare — once per AI session). Persistent across reboots so the developer can pull via the existing diag/feedback / log-fetch BLE path during support.

ts.description: When the feedback was received by the container.

verdict_summary.description: verdict.payload.summary from the session's final verdict event. Empty string when the session was evicted before feedback arrived (in-memory only; lost across container restart).

actions_taken.description: Compact references to what ran during the session. Joined to ai-actions.jsonl via action_id when fuller forensics are needed. Empty array when no actions executed (verdict-only sessions, or feedback after session eviction).

comment.description: User's freeform comment. CR/LF stripped before write. Absent when user didn't type one.

anonymized_transcript_uploaded.description: Set true ONLY when the user opted-in to the Phase 21 transcript upload AND the upload completed successfully. Default false. Lets a developer reading this log distinguish 'user gave feedback locally' from 'user also shared transcript' without consulting another data source.
